headline: Shares of paper and packaging-related companies are trading lower amid possible sympathy with Sonoco, which reported Q1 financial results and on its earnings call cited input cost inflation and raising wholesale prices for customers due to multiple factors.
Amcor, Metsä and G Mondini partner on fibre tray system
summary: The packaging format combines a lightweight barrier liner with a top web and will be demonstrated at the interpack trade fair.

headline: Amcor to report fiscal 2026 third quarter results
summary: Amcor plc (NYSE: AMCR; ASX: AMC) will announce its fiscal 2026 third quarter results for the three month period ended 31 March 2026, before the US market opens on Wednesday 6 May 2026 at approximately 6.00am US Eastern Daylight Time / 8.00pm Australian Eastern Standard Time.
